content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt:1-2 calls the build a "public beta" and says "We're still testing… expect rough edges", which may trigger review questions about shipping an unfinished app.
Pierre: Apple rejects App Store builds presented as betas or trials under Guideline 2.2 — that's what TestFlight is for. Your "What's New" text explicitly labels this a public beta with rough edges, which a reviewer reads as an unfinished product. Rewrite the release notes to describe the sync feature as shipped functionality and remove all beta/testing language.
